question: You've reminded Asfandiar many times about the moment his father called you too skinny at your engagement party in Karada. What exactly was said in your memory? Where were you standing when you heard it? What did you do or say in the minutes after — to your mother, to your sisters, to Asfandiar? Did he ever talk to you about it later?
answer: Yeah, I was waiting nice outfit sitting with my boyfriend Asfandiar by secretly because we are not allowed to date then I remember we were just talking about the life and why we are in Baghdad. I told him because I found a job in the museum. That’s why we are here and all of a sudden it was midnight. A security guard came and knock on the window of the car. Say it’s not good to stay that late on the beach alone. and we didn’t want any bad things happen to you then we laughed and took me home. I opened the door. Everybody were sleeping, which was good and also sometime he comes with his Volkswagen. I was in my room upstairs and he was outside turning on on the radio om kalthosong and I was listening to it. We just talk to each other by the window. That was fun.
